channel.title: LSCSS
channel.description: Articles and documentation for Layered Semantic CSS.

item.title: CSS @scope and LSCSS
item.description: How CSS @scope fits into Layered Semantic CSS: boundaries, layers, naming, and when scope is enough on its own.

item.title: CSS methodology evolution
item.description: How CSS methodologies responded to platform limits—and how cascade layers, scoping, container queries, and modern selectors change the trade-offs today.
